name: language-academy
description: Language Academy Monolith — Backend + Admin + Student + Website

scripts.build:admin: cd admin-portal && npm install && npx vite build
scripts.build:student: cd student-portal && npm install && npx vite build
scripts.build:website: cd website && npm install && npx next build
scripts.build:all: npm run build:admin && npm run build:student && npm run build:website
scripts.postinstall: cd backend && npm install && cd ../admin-portal && npm install && cd ../student-portal && npm install && cd ../website && npm install
